name: Fortuna Mining Corp.
description: Fortuna Mining Corp. is a Canadian precious metals mining company operating four operating mines in Argentina, Burkina Faso, Mexico, and Peru, and a fifth mine under construction in Côte d'Ivoire. The company is primarily engaged in the extraction of gold and silver, alongside base metals such as lead and zinc. Fortuna is committed to producing metals sustainably and creating shared value for its stakeholders through efficient operations and responsible mining practices.
